visual_findings: The dimension arrange fallback executed and reduced structured text-position overlap from 2 to 0, but the generated drawing is still not visually acceptable.
Generated main/projected view dimensions remain concentrated into a dense block unlike the cleaner reference drawing.
The long thin reference-style view composition is not preserved; generated dimension grouping changes the drawing intent and readability.
Notes and titlebar text are visible but still do not match the reference layout/readability.
API/reference-style pass evidence is supporting only; this application UI screenshot remains the final visual gate.
cases.required_next_action: Replace generic auto-dimension placement with reference-specific dimension grouping/selection rules for long_thin LB26001 parts, then regenerate LB26001-A-04-006 and rerun application UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
